# Subham Chhetri — Software Engineer

> Subham Chhetri is a Software Engineer at DHI InnoTech (DRIVE) in Thimphu, Bhutan,
> working at the intersection of AI, robotics, blockchain, and IoT. He holds a B.E. in
> Computer Science & Engineering (CGPA 9.65/10) and has shipped national-impact systems
> including Bhutan's sovereign ANPR system, an IoT water-management platform, offline
> blockchain R&D (ByteCrane, validated with Mysten Labs), reconfigurable robotics with
> MIT's Center for Bits and Atoms, and the Guru App (10,000+ downloads).

## Key facts
- Name: Subham Chhetri
- Role: Software Engineer at DHI InnoTech (DRIVE); freelance full-stack & mobile developer
- Location: Thimphu, Bhutan (works remotely with international clients worldwide)
- Education: B.E. Computer Science & Engineering, Chitkara University (2023), CGPA 9.65/10
- Focus areas: AI & computer vision, robotics, blockchain & Web3, IoT & embedded, system architecture, full-stack
- Contact: 2107.subham@gmail.com · GitHub https://github.com/SubhamChhetri · LinkedIn https://www.linkedin.com/in/subhamchhetri/
- Availability: available for freelance and contract projects (remote or on-site); pricing is project-based, quoted per scope
- Freelance track record: GEIPL (Guru App, 10,000+ downloads) and Energy Integrated (Netherlands, remote)

## Freelance services (available for hire)
- Full-stack web development — React, Next.js, Node.js, FastAPI (MVP to production)
- Mobile app development — React Native (iOS & Android), NFC, offline-first, on-device ML
- AI & LLM integration — GPT-4o/LLM features, computer vision, on-device ML
- IoT & blockchain systems — MQTT, ESP32, LoRa; Sui, Ethereum, NFTs
- To hire: email 2107.subham@gmail.com with project goals, timeline, and budget

## Pages
- [Home](https://subhamchhetri.dev/): overview, selected work, expertise, recent roles
- [About](https://subhamchhetri.dev/about): full bio, interests, languages
- [Projects](https://subhamchhetri.dev/projects): all projects with detail pages
- [Experience](https://subhamchhetri.dev/experience): work history, skills, education, trainings, awards
- [FAQ](https://subhamchhetri.dev/faq): factual answers about background, projects, and contact
- [Contact](https://subhamchhetri.dev/contact): email, phone, and social links

## Notable projects
- [DRIVE ANPR System](https://subhamchhetri.dev/projects/drive-anpr): Bhutan's sovereign AI number-plate recognition for the Royal Bhutan Police (YOLOv8 + Florence-2 OCR)
- [Guru App (Benzra)](https://subhamchhetri.dev/projects/guru-app): cross-platform digital prayer-bead app, 10,000+ downloads (React Native, NFC, on-device voice ML)
- [ByteCrane](https://subhamchhetri.dev/projects/bytecrane): offline IoT-to-blockchain, validated with the Sui team (Sui/Move, ESP32, LoRa)
- [Voxel Project (MILAbot)](https://subhamchhetri.dev/projects/voxel-milabot): reconfigurable robotic construction with MIT CBA
- [RiKhaNET](https://subhamchhetri.dev/projects/rikhanet): AI/IoT human–tiger conflict early-warning
- [Bhutan Cultural Heritage NFT Initiative](https://subhamchhetri.dev/projects/bhutan-heritage-nft): government-linked NFT initiative
- [BhuSIS](https://subhamchhetri.dev/projects/bhusis): national Bhutan Soil Information System (FastAPI, PostgreSQL, React Native, NDI)

Note: update the subhamchhetri.dev domain to the production domain once deployed.
